title: Heart Visualizer
description: Heart Visualizer offers three ways to display entity health—Heart Circle, Heart Bar, and Numeric
body: # Heart Visualizer Heart Visualizer offers three ways to display entity health—Heart Circle, Heart Bar, and Numeric—and its implementation draws partially from the code of [HealthIndicators](https://modrinth.com/mod/health-indicators). ## Heart Circle ![This is an image of a Minecraft Creeper surrounded by a circle of red hearts.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af1af660941443cad75a42bad689307cb1816d34.png) ![This is a GIF of a Minecraft Creeper surrounded by a circle of red hearts.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe528a3cbbd5418712cdfc696283f205a98e7157.gif) ## Heart Bar ![This is an image of a Minecraft Creeper with a row of red hearts above its head.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/783c84e4a0dc4bbdb25c37140c89fb0cc49956c2.png) ## Numeric ![This is an image of a Minecraft Creeper with a red heart above its head, showing its health value inside the heart.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3ec1655152108ecc53de388f32923bf0dbe2077.png) ## Usage This mod requires [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config). The default display type is Heart Circle, which appears after attacking a mob. To change the settings, please assign it to a menu button.
